content:
✔ 2️⃣ Archetype (Their Narrative Role)
• Players select from established narrative archetypes (Warrior, Trickster, Oracle, Archivist, etc.).
• Includes fixed buffs, debuffs, abilities, and dice roll mechanics.

✔ 3️⃣ Faction (Belief System & Ideological Identity)
• Players choose a faction based on literary, philosophical, or ideological worldviews.
• Factions have faction-wide buffs and collective voting power.
• Example Factions:
• The Preservationists (Defenders of Tradition & Knowledge)
• The Reformists (Advocates of Change & Literary Evolution)
• The Trickster Cult (Agents of Chaos & Disruption)
• The Archivists (Devoted to Record-Keeping & Storytelling)

✔ 4️⃣ Party (Small-Scale Alliances, Weekly-Based)
• Players can form temporary parties each week (2-4 members max).
• Parties offer temporary buffs that last only for that week.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 469 (chunk 469/555)
